notes: Basic shoot-em-up mechanics work but lacks true Galaga features like formation flying, boss Galaga, tractor beam, bonus stages, and enemy sprites are generic triangles rather than recognizable Galaga characters.
A functional but very basic space shooter that lacks Galaga's specific mechanics (swooping formations, tractor beams, dual ships) and uses primitive shapes instead of accurate sprites.

The build runs and basic movement/shooting/enemy waves work, but it is only a loose Galaga-like with simplistic visuals, missing hallmark mechanics/formation behavior, and some fragile array-splice collision logic that hurts gameplay reliability.
